subject: docs(claude-md): sync with upstream glow-props CLAUDE.md
body:
Synced missing sections from the external template at
devmade-ai/glow-props/CLAUDE.md:

- Added full PWA implementation code (Vite config, usePWAUpdate,
  usePWAInstall, install prompt race condition fix, timer leak
  patterns, key lessons)
- Added App Icons from SVG Source section (Sharp generator script,
  file structure, SVG design rules, manifest config)
- Fixed missing Risk field in commit message template code block

The condensed PWA prose descriptions were replaced with the full
detailed versions including working code examples. Project-specific
sections and local customizations preserved.

Tags: documentation, pwa, sync
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: documentation
Semver: patch
